{{Infobox construct
| name = Redmoon's Remnant
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon's Remnant]] is a crimson, winged, beaked-wolf-like creature.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon's Remnant]] is a monstrous beaked [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon's Remnant]] is a monster.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
